nasb.text: When he returned later to take her, he turned aside to look at the carcass of the lion; and behold, a swarm of bees and honey were in the body of the lion.

esv.text: After some days he returned to take her. And he turned aside to see the carcass of the lion, and behold, there was a swarm of bees in the body of the lion, and honey.

cnv.text: 過了些日子，參孫回去迎娶那女子，他轉向一旁去看看那隻死了的獅子；看見有一群蜂子和一些蜂蜜在獅子的屍體內。

ccb.text: 过了些日子，参孙下去迎娶她，途中他顺便去看那只死狮子，见死狮子体内有一群蜜蜂和一些蜂蜜，
